close_reason: Duplicate of y7er.16 (ed25519 not via workspace)
description: In secretx-signature/Cargo.toml, the ed25519 optional dep is declared inline as `ed25519 = { version = "2", optional = true }` instead of `ed25519 = { workspace = true, optional = true }`. The workspace already declares `ed25519 = "2"` in [workspace.dependencies]. What goes wrong: if the workspace ever bumps the ed25519 version (e.g., to 2.1 or 3), secretx-signature keeps its own pin and silently links a different version of the crate, which can cause duplicate symbols in the dep graph or type-incompatibilities between the workspace's ed25519::Signature and the one exposed by this crate. All other optional deps in this file (p256, rsa) correctly use workspace = true. Fix: change to `ed25519 = { workspace = true, optional = true }`.
title: ed25519 dep not pinned via workspace
